headline: Caterpillar appoints company veteran Kyle Epley as Chief Financial Officer, succeeding Andrew R.J. Bonfield effective May 1, 2026.
investor_impact: The internal promotion of a 30-year company veteran to CFO signals strategic continuity and stability for Caterpillar. The structured transition period with the outgoing CFO remaining through October 2026 minimizes execution risk and should be viewed as a low-drama, orderly succession by the market.
key_figures: 115% (Epley's target award under Annual Incentive Plan)
